_note: 2-month Bari strategy. Edit this file directly; regenerate dashboard to publish. current_phase advances manually as phases complete.

phases.title: Build Consumer-Ready Bari
phases.success_criteria: A consumer can arrive on Bari, compare products, read content, and subscribe.

sub_phases.title: Product Coverage
sub_phases.target: 1,000 validated products · 10–15 fully operational shelves

sub_phases.title: Website Foundation
sub_phases.target: Consumer-ready website. No placeholder pages.

sub_phases.title: Authority Content
sub_phases.target: 5 major articles — 1,500–3,000 words, charts, product references, internal links

sub_phases.title: Comparison Asset Library
sub_phases.target: 50–100 reusable comparison assets

sub_phases.title: SEO Readiness
sub_phases.target: Every page has meta title, description, structured URL, internal linking, OG image, indexability verified
done_when: Open Graph image on every page

sub_phases.title: SEO Operating System
sub_phases.target: 100 target keywords identified

sub_phases.title: Social Presence
sub_phases.target: Instagram, Facebook, TikTok — profiles complete with logo, bio, website, visual identity

sub_phases.title: Content Engine
sub_phases.target: 3–5 posts/week: shelf rankings, product battles, ingredient explainers, consumer myths

sub_phases.title: Visual Comparison Factory
sub_phases.target: 100 comparison visuals — reusable template system, no manual redesign each time

sub_phases.title: Video Factory
sub_phases.target: 20–30 short-form videos (best hummus, best milk, what the score means)

sub_phases.title: Email Capture
sub_phases.target: Newsletter signup live — tracking visitors, subscribers, conversion %

sub_phases.title: Traffic Review
sub_phases.target: Measure visitors, CTR, time on page, newsletter conversion — identify winners

sub_phases.title: Newsletter Launch
sub_phases.target: First issue sent regardless of list size — monthly cadence initially

sub_phases.title: Product Expansion
sub_phases.target: 2,000 products · 20–30 shelves

sub_phases.title: Content System
sub_phases.target: Every shelf produces: comparison page, blog, social posts, newsletter content

sub_phases.title: Nutrition Expert Review
sub_phases.target: 5–10 experts interviewed (dietitians, researchers, physicians) — find flaws, not validation

sub_phases.title: BSIP3 Exploration
sub_phases.target: First BSIP3 prototype — test future directions, do not replace BSIP2

sub_phases.title: Distribution Optimization
sub_phases.target: Review best channels, content, keywords — double down on winners

phases.title: Commercial Readiness Checkpoint
phases.success_criteria: Determine whether Bari has earned the right to monetize.

sub_phases.title: Monetization Assessment
sub_phases.target: Evaluate affiliate models, retail partnerships, premium subscriptions, B2B intelligence — decision only, no implementation yet

sub_phases.title: BSIP3 Readiness Review
sub_phases.target: Is BSIP3 materially better? Does it improve differentiation and consumer trust?
